HYPNOSISCREATOR-DOMINATION_POWER.title: Dom
HYPNOSISCREATOR-DOMINATION_POWER.descrip: Your Domination stacks. Match with an enemy's Sub for bonus effects.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-DOMINATION_POWER.smartDe: Domination {Amount}. Match with Sub for bonus effects.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SUBMISSION_POWER.title: Sub
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SUBMISSION_POWER.descrip: Submission stacks. When equal to the player's Dom, hypnosis syncs.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SUBMISSION_POWER.smartDe: Submission {Amount}. Syncs with Dom when equal.
